snippets.name: Word Count
snippets.description: Counts the words in the current text selection and shows the total.

snippets.name: Show Page Title
snippets.description: Displays the current page title and URL.

snippets.name: Reading Time
snippets.description: Estimates reading time at 200 words per minute.

snippets.name: Highlight Links
snippets.description: Outlines every anchor element on the page for a quick visual audit.

snippets.name: Scroll To Top
snippets.description: Smoothly scrolls the current page back to the top.
